text.title: Claude API Basics Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree gating whether claude-api-basics applies. Root question targets the maturity of the current Anthropic SDK call site; branches name a concrete observable and conclude with a core rule reference or a skip directive.

decision-tree.root-question: Is this the first Anthropic SDK call site in the codebase, OR is the existing client missing one of {env auth, full-date pin, retry, cost tracker, x-request-id}?

branch.conclusion: Wire env-only auth per rule r1.
Pin model id per rule r2.
Install tenacity covering 429 + 529 per rule r3.
Re-key tracker off `response.model` per rule r4.
Move client construction into worker init per rule r5.

example.description: A team finds production 529s crashing the pipeline. The tree concludes rule r3 — install tenacity with `(RateLimitError, APIStatusError)` and 5xx + 529 status filter.
